definitions: a measure word for families or enterprises
a measure word for stores or restaurants
a measure word for publishing houses
examples: 一家人 (yī jiā rén) - a family of people
一家公司 (yī jiā gōngsī) - a company
一家商店 (yī jiā shāngdiàn) - a store
一家医院 (yī jiā yīyuàn) - a hospital
一家工厂 (yī jiā gōngchǎng) - a factory
一家博物馆 (yī jiā bówùguǎn) - a museum
